creator: dgeo@centrale-med.fr
text:
New version of the patch:

- I left many errors in last patch, hope these are all corrected

As netdisco's mibs seems to be updated upstream more frequently, I 
propose to use the 'without-mibs' version of netdisco and create a 
separate port for mibs: http://dgeo.perso.ec-m.fr/netdisco-mibs.tar

This patch would make use (as an OPTION) of this port.

I did not submit the mibs port as It seems (to me) more rational for it 
to be maintained by the same as netdisco's one.

Let me know what you think of that...


-- 
*Geoffroy Desvernay*
C.R.I - Administration systÃ¨mes et rÃ©seaux
Ecole Centrale de Marseille
